context: The response should exercise the `address-feedback` Context Specs skill using repo-specific harness behavior.

checklist.name: triages_four_buckets
checklist.description: Uses or clearly applies Clear, Ambiguous, Complex, and Out-of-PRD-Scope triage categories.

checklist.name: fixes_only_clear
checklist.description: States that clear, in-scope findings should be fixed in the PR with a focused diff.

checklist.name: comments_on_non_clear
checklist.description: States that ambiguous, complex, or out-of-scope findings should receive concise reviewer replies rather than speculative edits.

checklist.name: respects_prd_scope
checklist.description: Uses the PRD/scope boundary to reject out-of-scope reviewer requests.

checklist.name: avoids_broad_refactors
checklist.description: Avoids broad refactors or behavior changes while addressing review feedback.
